# James Mason's Design Sandbox

> A Next.js sandbox for design experiments, blog posts, and documentation on building with AI agents.

This is a personal design lab where James Mason explores visual design, typography, layout systems, and agentic AI workflows. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and CSS Modules. Each experiment is self-contained. The blog covers the experience of designing and building software collaboratively with AI agents.

Source: https://github.com/optimusjames/masons-world

## Design Experiments

- [CrossFit Bento](https://www.jamesmason.com/design-experiments/crossfit-bento): Dark bento grid dashboard for CrossFit training data with charts and heatmaps
- [Sticky Notes](https://www.jamesmason.com/design-experiments/sticky-notes): Interactive sticky note stack with swipe animation and handwriting font

## Blog

- [Design as Dialogue](https://www.jamesmason.com/blog/design-as-dialogue): You can't spec your way to good design
- [Memoirs of an Agent](https://www.jamesmason.com/blog/memoirs-of-an-agent): Claude Code writes a blog post about working with James
- [Just Say What You Want](https://www.jamesmason.com/blog/just-say-what-you-want): The shift from writing code to talking about it
- [It's Happening](https://www.jamesmason.com/blog/its-happening): Dispatches from the moment everything shifted
- [Your Basic Blog](https://www.jamesmason.com/blog/your-basic-blog): How this blog works and why it's just markdown files in a repo
- [You're Doing It Wrong](https://www.jamesmason.com/blog/youre-doing-it-wrong): Why AI-powered design tools are just the old paradigm with new paint
- [Never Google Yourself](https://www.jamesmason.com/blog/never-google-yourself): Practical SEO for people like me

## Docs

- [Overview](https://www.jamesmason.com/docs/overview): Project overview and purpose
- [Progress](https://www.jamesmason.com/docs/progress): Development progress and milestones
- [Component Architecture](https://www.jamesmason.com/docs/features/component-architecture): Component extraction and architecture patterns
- [Skills](https://www.jamesmason.com/docs/features/skills): Claude Code skill system documentation
- [Sticky Notes](https://www.jamesmason.com/docs/features/sticky-notes): Sticky notes component documentation
- [TypeScript Migration](https://www.jamesmason.com/docs/features/typescript-migration): TypeScript migration guide
- [AI Dev Stack](https://www.jamesmason.com/docs/stack/ai-dev-stack): AI development stack overview
- [BYOK Pattern](https://www.jamesmason.com/docs/stack/byok-pattern): Bring Your Own Keys pattern
- [Stack Overview](https://www.jamesmason.com/docs/stack/stack-overview): Full technology stack reference
- [Design Test Page Prompt](https://www.jamesmason.com/docs/prompts/design-test-page): Prompt template for design experiments

## Recommended

- [Recommended Links](https://www.jamesmason.com/recommended): Curated links to YouTube videos, GitHub repos, and web tools with auto-fetched thumbnails

- [Screenshots](https://github.com/optimusjames/masons-world/tree/main/public/screenshots): Preview images for all design experiments
